name: Chicken & Sweet Potatoes
recipeIngredient: White sauce with chicken flavor or 3 tablespoons Water
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
In a medium bowl, combine sweet potatoes, brown sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, and milk.
Spread the mixture around the inside edge of a round 10-inch casserole, forming a ring.
In a medium non-stick skillet, heat broth over low heat.
Add onion and water chestnuts; cook until tender.
Add soup or sauce, chicken, and 3 tablespoons water; cook over medium heat until hot, stirring occasionally.
Spoon the chicken mixture into the center of the sweet potato ring in the casserole.
Bake uncovered for 30 minutes or until bubbling.
